root_cause: SQS queue deleted accidentally, causing message send failures
error_message: AWS.SimpleQueueService.NonExistentQueue: The specified queue does not exist
evidence: Queue not found in AWS console
CloudTrail shows DeleteQueue API call at 11:00 AM
Application attempting to send messages to deleted queue
resolution: Recreated SQS queue and updated application configuration
fix_commands: Update application config with new queue URL
preventive_measures: Enable deletion protection for critical queues
Use infrastructure-as-code to manage queue configuration
Implement queue existence checks before sending messages
Add CloudWatch alarm for queue not found errors
